sections.biography-source-undefined: Miao Shang served as the Grand Administrator of Henei Commandery under Zhang Yang. When Zhang Yang was slain by Yang Chou, Miao Shang was at Shequan City and decided to hold it alongside his comrade, Xue Hong. He later tendered his service to Sui Gu, who slayed Yang Chou. Sui Gu ordered Miao Shang and Xue Hong to hold Shequan City while he marched north to ally with Yuan Shao. However, the forces of Cao Cao slew Sui Gu and besieged Shequan City. They sent Dong Zhao to persuade Miao Shang and Xue Hong to surrender. Convinced in a meeting, they gave up the city immediately afterwards. They were soon made landed marquises.

full_text:
Miao Shang 繆尚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Miao Shang (繆尚). Was left behind by Zhang Yang’s killer to guard the area. Miao Shang was affiliated with Zhang Yang and the Wei Kingdom.

BiographySource Undefined
Miao Shang served as the Grand Administrator of Henei Commandery under Zhang Yang. When Zhang Yang was slain by Yang Chou, Miao Shang was at Shequan City and decided to hold it alongside his comrade, Xue Hong. He later tendered his service to Sui Gu, who slayed Yang Chou. Sui Gu ordered Miao Shang and Xue Hong to hold Shequan City while he marched north to ally with Yuan Shao. However, the forces of Cao Cao slew Sui Gu and besieged Shequan City. They sent Dong Zhao to persuade Miao Shang and Xue Hong to surrender. Convinced in a meeting, they gave up the city immediately afterwards. They were soon made landed marquises.
